QID141.QuestionText:
Before we begin, here are a few pointers for you:

 

The estimated time to complete this questionnaire is 15-20 minutes.

 

This questionnaire will automatically save your progress each time you click "next." 

 

The link to access this questionnaire is unique to you. If you close the questionnaire before you're done, you can pick up where you left off by using that link. That same link can also be shared with others, allowing you to have others fill in certain sections on your behalf.

 

For best results, do not complete the questionnaire in "private browsing" or "incognito mode." This will disable the auto-saving functionality.

QID240.QuestionText:
Sometimes physical separation supports better operations within an organization. Please identify any departments your team should NOT be located near for any reason. 

 

Please indicate which department(s) require physical separation from your department and why. (Select all that apply for each using the table below. If no physical separation is needed, leave blank.)

 

  • Confidentiality: Requires privacy to protect sensitive information, such as HR, legal, or financial matters
  • Security: Requires physical or data security measures to prevent unauthorized access or protect personnel or materials
  • Conflict of Interest: Involves situations where proximity may compromise ethical, financial, or oversight responsibilities
  • Something Else: Any other reason not described above, includes workstyles, functions, or processes that disrupt or conflict with each other when located nearby

DE.QuestionText:
Willkommen
In dieser Umfrage geht es um Ihr Arbeitsumfeld und wie Sie in diesem Umfeld arbeiten. Wir möchten insbesondere erfahren...

1. Wie Sie vor der COVID-19 Pandemie gearbeitet haben
2. Wie Sie derzeit während der COVID-19-Pandemie arbeiten, und
3. Wie Sie voraussichtlich arbeiten werden, wenn es wieder möglich ist ins Büro zurückzukehren.

Ihre Antworten werden vertraulich behandelt und nur in aggregierter Form ausgewertet.

ES.QuestionText:
¡BIENVENIDOS!
 
Reconocemos que los patrones de trabajo han evolucionado durante la pandemia.
 
Esta encuesta nos ayudará a aprender más sobre:
  • cómo trabajas actualmente,
  • cómo está utilizando la oficina, y
  • su experiencia laboral en la oficina ${e://Field/vchClientCoName}.

Esta encuesta debería tomar unos 15 minutos de su tiempo. Su respuesta a esta encuesta permanecerá confidencial y solo se informará en conjunto. ¡Gracias por su participación!

FR.QuestionText:
Bienvenue
Le but de ce sondage est de mieux comprendre ​​la façon dont vous travaillez ainsi que votre environnement de travail. Plus précisément, nous souhaitons en savoir davantage sur...
 
1. La façon dont vous travaillez actuellement.
2. Vos préférences et vos attentes face à votre environnement de travail post-pandémie.
 
Vos réponses resteront confidentielles et ne seront utilisées qu'à des fins statistiques.

FR-CA.QuestionText:
Bienvenue
Le but de ce sondage est de mieux comprendre ​​la façon dont vous travaillez ainsi que votre environnement de travail. Plus précisément, nous souhaitons en savoir davantage sur...
 
1. La façon dont vous travaillez actuellement.
2. Vos préférences et vos attentes face à votre environnement de travail post-pandémie.
 
Vos réponses resteront confidentielles et ne seront utilisées qu'à des fins statistiques.

IT.QuestionText:
Benvenuti
Questo survey ci aiutera’ a capire meglio il nostro attuale modo di lavorare e l’ambiente in cui lavoriamo. In particolare, siamo interessati a sapere...

1. Come lavoravi prima delle restrizioni dovute al COVID-19
2. Come lavori attualmente da casa durante le restrizioni dovute al COVID-19 
3. Come ti aspetti di lavorare nel futuro quando saremo in grado di tornare in ufficio.

Le tue risposte rimarranno anonime e saranno riportate in forma aggregata e riservata

JA.QuestionText:
ようこそ 
このアンケートでは、あなたの働き方とオフィス環境についてお伺いします。具体的に下記の項目について教えてください。

1. COVID-19以前の働き方について
2. COVID-19最中での働き方と、
3. オフィスに復帰できた後、どのような働き方を期待しているか

下記のご回答は機密情報として取り扱われ、個人は特定されません。

※実施期間は、●月●日（●）●:00～●月●日（●）●:00までです。

※上記の実施期間中にアンケートへのご回答をお願いいたします。  

※実施期間以前にアクセスされた場合は、再度実施期間中でのご回答をお願いいたします。 

※PCでの表示画面とiPhone/iPadでの表示画面は一部異なりますことを予めご了承ください。

KO.QuestionText:
환영합니다. 
이 설문지의 목적은 귀하의 근무 방식과 근무환경을 알아보는 것입니다. 설문지는 다음과 같은 내용을 포함하고 있습니다.
 
1. 코로나19 이전, 사무실에서의 근무 방식
2. 현재 본인의 재택근무 방식
3. 앞으로 사무실로 복귀 시 근무 방식

모든 답변은 비공개로 유지되며, 총합적인 보고서의 형태로만 전달이 될 것입니다.

TH.QuestionText:
สวัสดีค่ะ
แบบสอบถามนี้จะขอให้คุณประเมินวิธีการทำงานของคุณ
และสภาพแวดล้อมในสำนักงานของคุณ

ZH-S.QuestionText:
欢迎
本次调查是关于你如何工作以及你的工作环境

QID327.QuestionDescription: WELCOME!    NOX Leadership is requesting your help in completing this department questionnaire to...
QID327.QuestionText:
WELCOME! 
 
NOX Leadership is requesting your help in completing this department questionnaire to help shape our new workplace strategy. Our planning consultant, Gensler, will use your responses to understand key drivers behind your department’s current and future space needs. This Programming Questionnaire is designed to gather input from each department to help us:
 
  • Understand the spatial and functional needs of teams working in-person.
  • Identify the types of spaces and amenities that support effective in-person work and collaboration.
  • Ensure that our physical environments are purpose-driven and aligned with how our employees work.

Gensler will also be conducting some follow‐up interviews and site tours to confirm and expand upon your responses. Please note that this questionnaire is intended to focus on higher-level, department-wide operational and facility issues and needs.

This survey should take about 15-20 minutes of your time. We ask that you return your completed survey by Wednesday, January 7.

For technical questions, please contact Kathryn Decker from Gensler at kathryn_decker@gensler.com. Thank you for your participation!
QID327.QuestionText_Unsafe:

  • Understand the spatial and functional needs of teams working in-person.
  • Identify the types of spaces and amenities that support effective in-person work and collaboration.
  • Ensure that our physical environments are purpose-driven and aligned with how our employees work.

Gensler will also be conducting some follow‐up interviews and site tours to confirm and expand upon your responses. Please note that this questionnaire is intended to focus on higher-level, department-wide operational and facility issues and needs.

This survey should take about 15-20 minutes of your time. We ask that you return your completed survey by Wednesday, January 7.

For technical questions, please contact Kathryn Decker from Gensler at kathryn_decker@gensler.com. Thank you for your participation!

QID328.QuestionText:
We want to understand what type of workspace each staff requires. They fall under three categories:

  • Staff using a PRIVATE OFFICE: Includes staff who require an enclosed private office
  • Staff using a DEDICATED WORKSTATION: Includes staff who require a dedicated workstation for their individual use only
  • Staff using a SHARED WORKSTATION: Includes staff who do not require a dedicated workstation and can use a shared workstation with others
This helps us identify what type of workspace is needed for different types of staff—even if not all roles are captured in formal headcount reports. (Place a numerical value in the columns that apply. Approximate estimates are acceptable where precise projections are not available.)

QID362.QuestionText:
Please tell us about your current and projected headcounts. 

Staff is categorized into two types:

  • Regular / Ongoing Staff: Includes permanent, hybrid, or contract staff who consistently require a seat or workspace
  • Seasonal / Temporary / Project-Based Staff: Includes interns, part-time help, seasonal workers, or those supporting special or short-term projects
Additionally, we will want to understand how your staff utilizes the office:
  • Office-based staff: Who work primarily within the office space
  • Field-based staff: Who work primarily in the field / at project sites but may visit the office
  • Remote staff: Who work remotely but may visit the office
This helps us identify the quantity of workspace needed for different types of staff—even if not all roles are captured in formal headcount reports. (Place a numerical value in the columns that apply. Approximate estimates are acceptable where precise projections are not available.)
QID362.QuestionDescription: Please tell us about your current and projected headcounts.  Staff is categorized into two types:...
